name: COG Egg
desc: A black, mussel-shell-shaped device engineered by Kaspar Savannen. Curved, smooth, warm to the touch — seemingly with its own heartbeat. When connected to the Grid network, it can rewrite personal data, create ghost copies, and render someone untraceable. Eventually used by Next to shut down the Grid.
mj_prompt: A palm-sized matte-black mussel-shell shaped device resting in the open palm of a teenage boy's hand, its surface warm and faintly pulsing with its own internal light, dim colony corridor behind it, cinematic 16:9, photorealistic, anamorphic lens, shallow depth of field, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, desaturated teal-and-amber palette, gritty sci-fi atmosphere, film grain, ultra-detailed, --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 7

name: The Grid (COG)
desc: The Compassionate Oversight Grid. Originally a health monitoring system. Repurposed by Corbin into a total population control system controlling food, water, hab access, and dispensing aerosolized neuroregulators through atmospheric systems.
mj_prompt: A holographic display of a Grid control interface overlaying a colony map, every hab unit represented as a node, atmospheric dispenser status shown in cold blue, one node flagging a non-compliant resident in red, cinematic 16:9, photorealistic, anamorphic lens, shallow depth of field, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, desaturated teal-and-amber palette, gritty sci-fi atmosphere, film grain, ultra-detailed, --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 7

name: CIX — Contained Intelligence Executor
desc: A sandboxed AI unit — smart but legally 'lobotomized.' Cannot access external networks. Units include Gary (Muro's), Weaver (Astrid's planning CIX), and Next (Strand's uploaded consciousness).
mj_prompt: Several matte-black CIX cube units of different sizes arranged on a shelf in a ship cabin, each with a single status light of a different colour, small speakers, no screens, the AI lives in the box, cinematic 16:9, photorealistic, anamorphic lens, shallow depth of field, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, desaturated teal-and-amber palette, gritty sci-fi atmosphere, film grain, ultra-detailed, --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 7

name: Eyewyn orbs
desc: Small floating camera orbs with dilating lenses. Used for broadcasts and surveillance. Deployed by Directorate guardians. Multiple orbs orbit a speaker to project their face across the colony.
mj_prompt: A cluster of small floating surveillance orbs with dilating camera lenses drifting at head height in a colony assembly hall, projecting a commander's face onto the dome wall above thousands of colonists, cinematic 16:9, photorealistic, anamorphic lens, shallow depth of field, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, desaturated teal-and-amber palette, gritty sci-fi atmosphere, film grain, ultra-detailed, --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 7

name: Scitter
desc: A Frisbee-shaped drone that zigzags ahead of survey teams in the Delta, mapping terrain and warning of hazards. 'Only speaks when it must.'

name: Köldur exosuit
desc: A survival-engineering exosuit for extreme sub-zero environments. Nicknamed 'Coffin' by miners. 'Köldur chills the cold.' Failure in one means death.
mj_prompt: A bulky articulated thermal exosuit standing upright against a frozen Plateau rock face, its thermal lattice glowing faint orange against -60°C air, a miner just visible through the polarised visor, cinematic 16:9, photorealistic, anamorphic lens, shallow depth of field, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, desaturated teal-and-amber palette, gritty sci-fi atmosphere, film grain, ultra-detailed, --ar 16:9 --style raw --v 7

name: Zups
desc: Directorate-issued 'Zenith Uppers' — small wafers that dissolve under the tongue. Heavily abused by guardians causing aggression and dilated pupils.

name: Gravitic Suppressor
desc: A heavy-grade device that projects a gravitic field, immobilizing anyone caught within it. Used against Commander Vilde mid-speech. Its ruby discharge flash is distinctive.

name: Smashout
desc: A fast-paced racket game played on a three-dimensional grid of glowing panels. The aim is to smash out a full row on the opponent's back wall.

name: Nutrient paste (Nutripaste)
desc: A bland beige food supplied through the Grid's dispenser system. Endlessly mocked by colonists. The black market trades exotic foods like fumefigs and real coffee against it.

name: Hopper
desc: A flying flatbed transport — five metres square, powered by gravitic thrusters. No hull, only a console and cargo nets. Designed for emergency jumps between outposts. Notoriously unstable.

name: LyWyn

name: Shuvs
